args.code: (()=>{const a=[...document.querySelectorAll('a')].find(x=>(x.href||'').includes('B0CZ7F61XN')); if(!a)return JSON.stringify({ok:false,reason:'amazon_link_not_found'}); const row=a.closest('tr')||a.closest('.ant-table-row')||a.closest('tbody')||a.parentElement; const targets=[...row.querySelectorAll('a,button,span')].map(n=>({n,t:(n.innerText||n.textContent||'').trim(),href:n.href||''})); const edit=targets.find(x=>x.t==='编辑'||x.t.includes('编辑')); if(!edit)return JSON.stringify({ok:false,reason:'edit_button_not_found',targets:targets.map(x=>({t:x.t,href:x.href})).slice(-20)}); edit.n.click(); return JSON.stringify({ok:true,clicked:edit.t});})()
